Title: Secure API Credentials
Label: credentials
Description:
Register and verify access to all external APIs required for prototype ingestion. This is on the critical path — extract tasks cannot be tested without credentials.

## Checklist
- [ ] Register for NOMIS API key (nomisweb.co.uk)
- [ ] Verify ONS Open Data access (no key required, but confirm endpoint availability)
- [ ] Register for DWP Stat-Xplore API key (stat-xplore.dwp.gov.uk)
- [ ] Store credentials securely and add to .env on dev environment

Title: Database Setup and Geography Layer
Label: database
Description:
Stand up the dev SQL Server schema and populate the geography dimension table that underpins all spatial aggregation.

## Checklist
- [ ] Run ``alembic upgrade head`` to create Indicator, DatasetMetadata, and GeoLookup tables
- [ ] Download LSOA→MSOA→LAD→Region mappings from ONS Open Geography Portal
- [ ] Seed GeoLookup table with mappings for all 22 Yorkshire LADs
- [ ] Validate row counts and spot-check a few LSOA→LAD lookups

Title: Shared Transform and Load Pipeline
Label: pipeline
Description:
Implement the reusable transform and load tasks that every flow depends on. This is the core ETL plumbing — nothing can run end-to-end until these work.

## Transform tasks (tasks/transform/)
- [ ] validate.py: validate_schema() — check required columns and non-zero rows; validate_yorkshire_lads() — warn on missing LAD codes vs YORKSHIRE_LAD_CODES
- [ ] normalise.py: normalise_to_indicator() — map source-specific DataFrames to canonical Indicator schema
- [ ] geo.py: aggregate_to_lad() — join sub-LAD data (LSOA/MSOA) with GeoLookup and aggregate to LAD level

## Load tasks (tasks/load/)
- [ ] sql_server.py: upsert_indicators() — MERGE or DELETE+INSERT on (indicator_id, lad_code, reference_period) composite key
- [ ] sql_server.py: write_metadata() — insert DatasetMetadata audit record per flow run

## Utilities
- [ ] utils/metadata.py: build_metadata_record() — factory for DatasetMetadata ORM instances
- [ ] utils/geo_lookups.py: get_geo_lookup() and lsoa_to_lad() — LRU-cached geography lookups

## Tests
- [ ] Unit tests for all transform tasks (mock DB and API calls)
- [ ] Unit tests for load tasks and utility functions

Title: Nomis and ONS API Connectors
Label: extract
Description:
Build extract tasks for NOMIS and ONS — the two primary sources for the economy domain.

## Extract tasks
- [ ] nomis.py: extract_bres() — Business Register Employment Survey (employment by industry at LAD level)
- [ ] nomis.py: extract_aps() — Annual Population Survey (economic activity, qualifications)
- [ ] ons.py: extract_regional_accounts() — GVA/GDP data from ONS Open Data API

## Acceptance criteria
- Each task returns a pandas DataFrame filtered to Yorkshire LADs
- Handles API pagination and rate limits
- Unit tests with mocked API responses

Title: DWP Stat-Xplore Connector
Label: extract
Description:
Build the DWP Stat-Xplore extract task for claimant count data.

## Extract task
- [ ] dwp.py: extract_claimant_count() — call Stat-Xplore API for Universal Credit / JSA claimant counts by LAD and month

## Acceptance criteria
- Returns DataFrame with claimant counts for all 22 Yorkshire LADs
- Uses settings.dwp_api_key.get_secret_value() for auth
- Handles Stat-Xplore JSON cube response format
- Unit tests with mocked API responses

Title: Prototype Economy Flows
Label: flow
Description:
Wire up the first three end-to-end flows: extract → validate → normalise → load.

## Flows
- [ ] flows/economy/employment_jobs.py — Nomis BRES/APS → transform → load
- [ ] flows/economy/claimant_count.py — DWP Stat-Xplore → transform → load
- [ ] flows/economy/gdp_gva.py — ONS Regional Accounts → transform → load

## Acceptance criteria
- Each flow runs end-to-end on dev environment
- Data lands correctly in Indicator table with proper upsert behaviour
- DatasetMetadata audit records written for each run
- Prefect UI shows successful flow runs with task-level logging

Title: Prototype Testing and Milestone Review
Label: milestone

Integration testing and stakeholder demo — the End-Apr 2026 deliverable.

## Testing
- [ ] Integration tests for all 3 economy flows against dev SQL Server
- [ ] Verify upsert idempotency (re-running doesn't duplicate data)
- [ ] Data quality checks — spot-check values against source websites

## Milestone review

- [ ] Document scope adjustments needed for scale-out phase
